Title: Introduction
Description: Organizations need to classify, label, and protect sensitive data to prevent exposure and ensure compliance. Microsoft Purview solutions provide data classification, sensitivity labels, and encryption to secure information across Microsoft 365 and on-premises storage. This learning path aligns with exam SC-401: Microsoft Information Security Administrator.

Title: Summary
Description: At Team Xbox, we believe that when everyone plays, we all win. We're committed to ensuring as many developers as possible have the tools needed to create accessible experiences. This learning path introduces foundational concepts about gaming accessibility for game, platform, and hardware developers looking to expand their knowledge in this space.

Description: In today's fast-paced digital era, artificial intelligence (AI) is changing the way we train and educate. This learning path is designed to equip you with an understanding of how AI tools can transform a learning environment. Throughout this learning path, you'll explore how AI can elevate the training experience, build engaging content, and foster a more inclusive training environment. You'll also explore the advantages of integrating AI-powered productivity tools into your daily educational practices. By the end of this learning path, you'll be equipped to design and implement training ecosystems that apply AI tools to enhance the training process.

Title: Summary and resources
Description: This course supports educators in exploring how Microsoft AI tools can be thoughtfully used in special education environments to reduce administrative demands, strengthen accessibility, and support clear communication with families. Throughout the learning path, responsible use of AI, privacy, and transparency are emphasized so educators can determine when and how AI fits into their practice in ways that align with student needs and professional values.

Title: Configure data connectors in Microsoft Sentinel
Description: This learning path helps IT administrators, service providers, and partners learn how to manage and support Microsoft Surface devices using the Surface Management Portal and Surface Support Portal. Learners compare both portals, understand how Intune enrollment and tenant context affect access, and practice selecting the correct portal for common management and support tasks. Through task-based modules and decision scenarios, learners verify prerequisites, assign required roles, initiate service or support actions, and track requests using the correct portal while following tenant-scoped guardrails and escalation boundaries.

Title: Azure Arc
Description: Learn how to implement the production-grade technical capabilities required to make multi-agent systems reliable, secure, and maintainable. This training helps learners advance from foundational prompting, tool consumption, and RAG patterns to designing multi-intervention guardrail architectures, building enterprise MCP servers, implementing hybrid RAG pipelines, and architecting durable agent memory systems with Azure Cosmos DB. AI-500

Title: Summary and resources
Description: This Learning Path introduces the latest Microsoft Education solutions designed to support both K–12 and higher education institutions. It provides an overview of how administrators, educators, students, and IT professionals can use Microsoft tools to enhance teaching, learning, and institutional operations across primary, secondary, and postsecondary environments. Learners will explore capabilities across Microsoft Education offerings, including tools for content creation and assessment, as well as solutions that support accessibility, inclusivity, and personalized learning. The Learning Path also covers how institutions can maintain secure and compliant environments, manage devices and users, and leverage data insights to improve student outcomes and operational efficiency. By the end of this Learning Path, participants will have a foundational understanding of how Microsoft Education solutions can be applied across roles to create engaging, secure, and effective learning experiences—empowering students, faculty, and staff to collaborate, innovate, and succeed throughout the educational journey.
